testcase.failure:
[tier1] › tier1.auth.spec.ts:14:7 › TIER 1: Authentication › should display login page ───────────
Error: expect(locator).toBeVisible() failed
Locator: getByRole('heading', { name: 'Login' }) Expected: visible Timeout: 5000ms Error: element(s) not found
Call log: - Expect "toBeVisible" with timeout 5000ms - waiting for getByRole('heading', { name: 'Login' })
14 | test('should display login page', async ({ page }) => { 15 | await page.goto('/auth/login'); > 16 | await expect(page.getByRole('heading', { name: 'Login' })).toBeVisible(); | ^ 17 | 18 | // Try label first, then fallback to input selector 19 | const emailInput = page.locator('input[type="email"], input[name="email"]').first(); at C:\Users\HOME\Downloads\fieldcost\e2e\tier1.auth.spec.ts:16:64
